pi_items.source: Task definition and setup_task.sh concept creation logic
Task definition and verifier.py scoring logic
Standard OpenMRS 3 legacy administration URL, matching verified values from the environment.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires retiring a synthetic concept named 'Legacy Pain Management' and specifying a retirement reason containing '2026 Guidelines'. This concept is dynamically generated in the environment's setup script. The administration panel is accessible at the standard OpenMRS legacy admin URL (http://localhost/openmrs/admin/index.htm).
